overview.Name: Crescent Energy Co
overview.Description: Crescent Energy Co (CRGY) is a leading oil and natural gas exploration and production company focused on developing domestic onshore resources, primarily within high-potential shale formations across the United States. Committed to sustainability and capital efficiency, Crescent emphasizes disciplined growth and seeks to enhance financial performance through innovative technologies that optimize production and recovery rates. As the energy sector evolves, the company is well-positioned to capitalize on emerging opportunities, solidifying its competitive edge in a dynamic market landscape.
overview.Address: 600 TRAVIS STREET, HOUSTON, TX, UNITED STATES, 77002
